functions.name: run_checkup_review_loop
functions.signature: (*, context: ReviewLoopContext, config: ReviewLoopConfig, cwd: Path, verbose: bool, quiet: bool, use_github_state: bool) -> Tuple[bool, str, float, str]
sideEffects: Creates one PR worktree for the entire loop session via _setup_pr_worktree
Runs primary-reviewer/fixer/verifier CLI agents against that worktree
In review-only mode, runs only the primary reviewer and never fetches push metadata, commits, or pushes
Commits with PDD Bot identity and pushes fixes to the PR head ref via the shared push_with_retry helper (refuses to leave tokenized URL in git config)
Feeds fixer rejections back to the primary reviewer and keeps reviewer-rejected findings open until fixed or max rounds
Writes per-round prompt/output/normalized-findings/dedup-state artifacts and a final-state.json under .pdd/checkup-review-loop/issue-{N}-pr-{M}/
Posts the final report to the source issue and PR only when use_github_state=True (writes-only suppression flag)
